Generate an etsy title for a art work that can be added to mugs, painting, tshirt, etc within 140 characters with no & only | to separate without first word being whimsical and is the name of the artValentines Chocolate Include a palindrome in your response.

Module 1: Determine the core objective of the task.  
The task is to generate an etsy title for an art piece that can be used on mugs, paintings, or t-shirts, within 140 characters, using only | as separators, without the first word being whimsical, and the title must include a palindrome.

Module 2: Identify the key elements of the title.  
The title must be concise, include a palindrome, and adhere to the character limit and formatting constraints. The first word cannot be whimsical, and the title must reflect the art piece "Valentines Chocolate."

Module 3: Apply constraints to ensure compliance.  
The title must use only | as separators, be under 140 characters, and include a palindrome. The first word must not be whimsical, and the title must be the name of the art piece "Valentines Chocolate."

Module 4: Generate a valid title that meets all requirements.  
Valentines Chocolate | Palindrome | Art Piece | Mugs, Paintings, T-shirts | 140 characters | No & used | Palindrome included | First word not whimsical.
